properties.duration: Oral 2-4 hours. | Insufflated 2-4 hours. | Vapourized 1-2 hours.
properties.onset: Oral 10-30 minutes. | Insufflated 1-10 minutes. | Vapourized 1-2 minutes.
properties.summary: A rare stimulant drug related to a-PVP. The drug is very uncommon. The drug is suspected to be less potent than a-PVP, however little data exists on this compound and its effects on humans. Consume with caution.
